issues.main_description_html:
Refactor PhotographerLocation.jsx

Objective

Refactor the PhotographerLocation.jsx component to improve maintainability, testability, and readability by separating business logic (state management and API calls) from the UI layer. The file currently has ~1000 lines of mixed concerns.

Current State

All location states, API hooks, geocoding logic, and form submission functions are tightly coupled within the PhotographerLocation component.

Proposed Architecture

  1. hooks/useLocationForm.js

    • Responsibility: Manages all local form states.
    • State Variables: location, subLocations, inputLatLng, hasMainLocation, expandedKeys, selectedMainLocation, selectedSubLocations, etc.
    • Functions: Handlers for adding/removing sublocations, parsing/validating coordinates, and applying location data.

  2. hooks/useLocationAPI.js

    • Responsibility: Handles all data fetching and mutations.
    • Dependencies: React Query / Custom Fetch Hooks (useLazyFetch, usePatch, usePost, useDelete).
    • Functions: getLocation, saveLocation, saveSubLocation, updateSubLocation, deleteSubLocation, and getLocationByLatLng.

  3. utils/locationUtils.js

    • Responsibility: Pure helper functions to keep the component and hooks clean.
    • Functions: normalizeMain, diffSubLocation, and empty sublocation constants.

  4. PhotographerLocation.jsx

    • Responsibility: Pure UI composition.
    • Calls the custom hooks and passes state/callbacks down to presentational components (MainLocationContent, SubLocationContent, LocationMapCard, etc.).

Acceptance Criteria

  • PhotographerLocation.jsx line count is significantly reduced.
  • All unit and integration flows for setting/saving locations still work.
  • Form state management is fully isolated in useLocationForm.js.
  • API logic is fully isolated in useLocationAPI.js.

Scope

This task only covers the refactoring of PhotographerLocation.jsx and its immediate location-related logic. It does not change the user interface or existing behaviors.

issues.display_title: Issue #4112: Refactor PhotographerTools: Extract UI and Hook
issues.main_description_html:
Refactor PhotographerTools.jsx by extracting logic and UI.

Detailed Tasks:

1. Create Custom Hook (usePhotographerTools.js)

  • Extract all local state (drone, dslr, camera360, scanner3D, editedEquipment, invalidEquipmentFields, expandedKeys, savingEquipmentId, isFirstLoading).
  • Extract Redux logic (photographer, status, dispatching SET_PHOTOGRAPHER_DATA).
  • Extract API calls (getTools, saveTools, deleteTools).
  • Extract form handlers (handleAddRow, handleRemoveNewRow, handleEquipmentFieldChange, executeSaveTools, handleDeleteTools).
  • Extract React Router blockers and leave confirmation logic.

2. Create UI Component (EquipmentAccordionItem.jsx)

  • Create a reusable wrapper for NextUI's AccordionItem.
  • Accept props: ypeKey, itle, items, handleAddRow, isFirstLoading, etc.
  • Handle rendering the empty states and mapping over items to render ListItemTools.

3. Refactor Main Page (PhotographerTools.jsx)

  • Import and initialize usePhotographerTools().
  • Replace the 4 repetitive AccordionItem blocks (Drone, 360 Camera, DSLR, 3D Scanner) with 4 components.
  • Maintain the PageLayout, Status header, and Modals (DeleteModal, ConfirmProfileUpdateModal).
  • Verify ESLint and Prettier formatting.
